skins.name: Dreamsicle
skins.author: starvingartist
skins.description: Captures the Dreamcast bright, clean geometry with portrait and landscape layouts.

skins.description: Controller-focused Dreamcast pad, no on-screen touch controls.

skins.description: Modern evolution of the Atari Lynx II with portrait and landscape modes.

skins.description: Classic console-style Atari Lynx with portrait and landscape modes.

skins.description: Console-style Atari Lynx II with portrait and landscape modes.

skins.name: HZN - Sega Master System Pinball Joy
skins.author: HoriZon

skins.name: DualShocked
skins.author: starvingartist
skins.description: Inspired by the original Sony PlayStation with a DualShock-style layout. Portrait and landscape, edge-to-edge, QuickLoad/QuickSave, fast-forward, dynamic pressable buttons.

skins.name: HZN PS1 Console Style Pinball Joy
skins.author: HoriZon
skins.description: Pinball-optimized PS1 skin with large flipper and tilt buttons. Portrait and landscape, edge-to-edge, tested with 11+ PS1 pinball titles. PS Logo as menu button.

skins.name: HZN PS1 Nostromo Console Style
skins.author: HoriZon
skins.description: Console-style PS1 skin with portrait and landscape layouts, D-PAD and joystick options, edge-to-edge (iPhone X+ only), ToggleFastForward, QuickLoad/QuickSave.

skins.name: M-Gage PlayStation Gamepad
skins.author: JanZa
skins.description: Modern reimagining of the 2003 Nokia N-Gage aesthetic applied to PS1. Interactive button animations, Quick save/load/volume/fast-forward/RetroAchievements/menu, Dynamic Island hidden.

skins.name: PS1 Controller
skins.author: JanZa
skins.description: Minimalistic controller-only skin. Edge-to-edge, Dynamic Island hidden, no on-screen buttons — designed for gamepad users.

skins.name: PS1 Dark Controller SCE
skins.author: JanZa
skins.description: Dark-themed minimalistic controller-only skin. Dynamic Island fully hidden, no touchscreen buttons. Created for the 1st annual Manic skin competition.

skins.name: HZN - Virtual Boy Classic Console Style
skins.author: HoriZon
skins.description: Console-style Virtual Boy skin optimized for edge-to-edge displays.

skins.name: HZN - Virtual Boy Pinball Style
skins.author: HoriZon
skins.description: Virtual Boy pinball controller skin with large flipper buttons.
